@@ -27,3 +27,5 @@ {"id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7","title":"EPIC: Phase 7 - Documentation & Release","description":"## Overview Comprehensive documentation updates and v3.0.0 release preparation. ## Documentation Updates ### 1. Rebrand README ```markdown

giil

Get Image [from] Internet Link

Originally built for iCloud, now supporting: - iCloud • Dropbox • Google Photos • Google Drive [experimental] ``` ### 2. Platform Support Table ```markdown | Platform | Method | Speed | Full Resolution | |----------|--------|-------|-----------------| | iCloud | Playwright (4-tier) | 5-15s | ✅ Yes | | Dropbox | Direct URL (no browser!) | 1-3s | ✅ Yes | | Google Photos | URL extraction + direct | 5-10s | ✅ Yes | | Google Drive | Playwright [experimental] | 5-15s | Conditional | ``` ### 3. Per-Platform Examples Show usage for each platform with expected output. ### 4. Per-Platform Troubleshooting - Dropbox: Password-protected, expired links - Google Photos: Private albums, video handling - Google Drive: "Anyone with link" requirement - iCloud: Existing troubleshooting (unchanged) ### 5. Migration Notes ```markdown ## Upgrading from v2.x Key changes: - Default: Original bytes preserved (compression now opt-in) - New JSON fields: schema_version, ok, platform - New exit codes: 10-13, 20 - New flags: --optimize, --convert, --print-url ``` ## AGENTS.md Updates - Add new platform architecture to "Supported Platforms" section - Update capture strategy diagram - Document new exit codes ## Release Checklist 1. [ ] Update VERSION to 3.0.0 2. [ ] Update README with all changes 3. [ ] Update AGENTS.md 4. [ ] Create release notes template 5. [ ] Tag v3.0.0 6. [ ] Verify GitHub release artifacts 7. [ ] Update install.sh URL in README ## Success Criteria - [ ] README reflects multi-platform support - [ ] Each platform has usage examples - [ ] Each platform has troubleshooting section - [ ] Migration notes help v2 users - [ ] v3.0.0 release published with checksums ","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-03T22:26:24.290759855-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-03T22:26:24.290759855-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7","depends_on_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-03T22:26:24.320086429-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7","depends_on_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-03T22:27:23.958908937-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7.1","title":"Rewrite README for multi-platform support","description":"## What Comprehensively update README.md to reflect multi-platform support, rebrand messaging, and v3 changes. ## Header Rebrand FROM: ```markdown # Get iCloud Image Link Download full-resolution images from iCloud photo shares ``` TO: ```markdown # giil ### Get Image [from] Internet Link Download full-resolution images from cloud sharing links. Originally built for iCloud, now supporting Dropbox, Google Photos, and Google Drive. ``` ## New Platform Support Table ```markdown ## Supported Platforms | Platform | Method | Speed | Full Resolution | Notes | |----------|--------|-------|-----------------|-------| | iCloud | Playwright (4-tier) | 5-15s | ✅ Always | Original and best-supported | | Dropbox | Direct URL | 1-3s | ✅ Always | No browser needed! | | Google Photos | URL extraction | 5-10s | ✅ Always | Uses =s0 modifier | | Google Drive | Playwright | 5-15s | Conditional | [Experimental] Requires public sharing | ``` ## Per-Platform Examples ```markdown ## Quick Examples ### iCloud \`\`\`bash giil "https://share.icloud.com/photos/abc123" \`\`\` ### Dropbox (fastest!) \`\`\`bash giil "https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/xxx/photo.png?dl=0" # Direct download, no browser needed \`\`\` ### Google Photos \`\`\`bash giil "https://photos.app.goo.gl/abc123" # Also works with album links for --all mode \`\`\` ### Google Drive [experimental] \`\`\`bash giil "https://drive.google.com/file/d/xxx/view" # File must be shared as "Anyone with the link" \`\`\` ``` ## Per-Platform Troubleshooting ```markdown ## Troubleshooting ### Dropbox - **"Received HTML instead of image"**: Link may be password-protected or expired - **Empty output**: Verify the file is publicly shared ### Google Photos - **"AUTH_REQUIRED"**: Album is private. Ask owner to make it public. - **Low resolution**: Ensure giil is using =s0 modifier (check with --verbose) ### Google Drive - **"File is not publicly shared"**: Owner must set "Anyone with the link" access - **Quality warning**: Drive may return lower-resolution thumbnails as fallback ``` ## v3 Changes Section ```markdown ## Upgrading from v2.x ### Breaking Changes - **Exit codes 4 and 5 changed**: Network errors now exit 10, auth errors exit 11 - **JSON schema additions**: New fields `schema_version`, `ok`, `platform` ### Behavior Changes - **Original bytes preserved by default**: Use `--optimize` for MozJPEG compression - **New flags**: `--print-url`, `--verbose`, `--trace`, `--convert`, `--optimize` ### Migration \`\`\`bash # If you were checking exit codes: # v2: if [ $? -eq 4 ]; then → v3: if [ $? -eq 10 ]; then # v2: if [ $? -eq 5 ]; then → v3: if [ $? -eq 11 ]; then # If you relied on automatic JPEG compression: # v2: giil "https://..." # v3: giil "https://..." --optimize \`\`\` ``` ## File Size Considerations Current README is comprehensive. Be careful not to bloat it. Consider: - Keep main README focused on quick-start - Add PLATFORMS.md for deep platform-specific docs (if needed) - Link to GitHub wiki for edge cases ","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-03T22:43:21.07736515-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-03T22:43:21.07736515-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7.1","depends_on_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-03T22:43:21.106462934-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7.1","depends_on_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-03T22:44:31.340184091-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7.2","title":"Update AGENTS.md architecture diagram","description":"## What Update the architecture diagram in AGENTS.md to reflect v3 changes, specifically the Dropbox fast path that bypasses extractor.mjs. ## Current Diagram (INCORRECT for v3) ``` ┌─────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ │ Dropbox │ │ Google │ │ iCloud/ │ │ (curl) │ │ Photos │ │ GDrive │ └─────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ │ │ │ ▼ ▼ ▼ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ extractor.mjs (Playwright) │ ``` This shows Dropbox going to extractor.mjs, but v3 bypasses it entirely! ## Corrected Diagram (v3) ``` ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ URL Input │ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │ ▼ ┌──────────────────┐ │ detect_platform()│ └──────────────────┘ │ ┌─────────────────────┼─────────────────────┐ ▼ ▼ ▼ ┌─────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ │ Dropbox │ │ Google │ │ iCloud/ │ │ FAST │ │ Photos │ │ GDrive │ └─────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘ │ │ │ │ ▼ ▼ │ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ │ extractor.mjs (Playwright) │ │ │ │ │ │ TIER 1: Download button (9 selectors) │ │ │ ↓ fail │ │ │ TIER 2: Network CDN interception │ │ │ ↓ fail │ │ │ TIER 3: Element screenshot │ │ │ ↓ fail │ │ │ TIER 4: Viewport screenshot │ │ └─────────────────────────────────────────┘ │ │ ▼ ▼ ┌─────────┐ ┌──────────────────┐ │ curl │ │ Image Processing │ │ raw=1 │ │ Sharp + MozJPEG │ └─────────┘ │ EXIF extraction │ │ │ HEIC conversion │ │ └──────────────────┘ │ │ └───────────────┬───────────┘ ▼ ┌──────────────────┐ │ Output │ │ (file/json/b64) │ └──────────────────┘ ``` ## Key Changes to Highlight 1. **Dropbox exits early** - Direct curl download, no Playwright 2. **Platform-specific paths** - Each platform has tailored strategy 3. **Shared output layer** - All paths converge for final output ## Also Update 1. Exit codes table (add new codes 10-13, 20) 2. CLI options table (add new flags) 3. Supported Platforms table (already present, verify accuracy) ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-03T22:43:47.488767143-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-03T22:43:47.488767143-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7.2","depends_on_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-03T22:43:47.518067719-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7.2","depends_on_id":"get_icloud_image_link-hdm.7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-03T22:44:31.360643281-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} +{"id":"get_icloud_image_link-qoh","title":"EPIC: Comprehensive Test Coverage for giil v3.0","description":"## Overview giil currently has minimal test coverage: - 2 unit test files (platform-detection, content-validation) - 1 integration test (iCloud only, no Dropbox/Google Photos/Google Drive) - No error scenario tests - No output mode tests (--base64, --preserve, --convert) - No verbose logging in test infrastructure ## Goal Achieve comprehensive test coverage using REAL tests (no mocks/fakes) with detailed logging for debugging. All tests should: 1. Test actual functionality against real or realistic data 2. Provide verbose, structured logging for CI debugging 3. Cover all code paths and edge cases 4. Support both local development and CI execution ## Major Gaps to Fill ### Unit Tests (Pure Functions) - URL normalization (normalize_url, normalize_dropbox_url) - EXIF datetime extraction (getExifDateTime) - Filename generation (generateFilename) - JSON output formatting (formatJsonSuccess, formatJsonError) - Google Photos URL extraction (extractGooglePhotosBaseUrl) - Exit code error classification - processAndSaveImage logic branches ### Integration Tests (E2E) - Multi-platform: iCloud, Dropbox, Google Photos, Google Drive - Error scenarios: timeout, auth required, not found, unsupported type - Output modes: --json, --base64, --preserve, --convert - Album mode: --all for different platforms - CLI flags: --verbose, --trace, --print-url, --debug-dir ### Bash Layer Tests - CLI argument parsing - Platform detection (bash version) - Dependency detection - Version consistency ### Infrastructure - Verbose structured logging (JSON format for CI parsing) - Test fixtures with real image files - Replay tests for deterministic results ## Success Criteria - 90%+ code coverage on testable pure functions - All 4 platforms have at least 1 live integration test - All exit codes have corresponding error scenario tests - All CLI flags have at least 1 test - Detailed logging makes CI failures debuggable ","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-04T02:39:47.940248927-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T02:39:47.940248927-05:00"} +{"id":"get_icloud_image_link-tfk","title":"FEATURE: Unit Test Expansion - Pure JavaScript Functions","description":"## Overview Expand unit test coverage for all pure JavaScript functions embedded in giil. These tests use Node.js native test runner and extract functions via extract-functions.mjs. ## Current Coverage - ✅ detectPlatform() - platform-detection.test.mjs - ✅ validateContentType() - content-validation.test.mjs - ✅ validateMagicBytes() - content-validation.test.mjs - ✅ validateImageContent() - content-validation.test.mjs ## Missing Coverage (HIGH PRIORITY) 1. **formatJsonSuccess/formatJsonError** - JSON output schema v3 2. **extractGooglePhotosBaseUrl** - Google Photos =s0 URL extraction 3. **getExifDateTime** - EXIF metadata parsing 4. **generateFilename** - Filename from datetime/index ## Missing Coverage (MEDIUM PRIORITY) 5. **downloadGooglePhotosFullRes** - Full-res download logic 6. **parseGoogleDriveId** - File ID extraction from Drive URLs 7. **getGoogleDriveDownloadUrl/getGoogleDrivePreviewUrl** - URL builders 8. **ErrorMap** - Error code to exit code mapping ## Testing Approach - Extract functions via extract-functions.mjs (already exists) - Use real data where possible (actual EXIF buffers, real URLs) - Each function gets its own describe() block - Test edge cases: null, undefined, empty, malformed inputs ## Files to Create/Modify - scripts/tests/json-formatting.test.mjs (NEW) - scripts/tests/google-photos.test.mjs (NEW) - scripts/tests/exif-datetime.test.mjs (NEW) - scripts/tests/filename-generation.test.mjs (NEW) - scripts/tests/error-mapping.test.mjs (NEW) - scripts/tests/extract-functions.mjs (MODIFY - add new extractors) ## Dependencies - Requires extract-functions.mjs updates to export new functions - Some tests need sample image buffers (JPEG with EXIF, HEIC, etc.) ","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-04T02:40:12.100046298-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T02:40:12.100046298-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"get_icloud_image_link-tfk","depends_on_id":"get_icloud_image_link-qoh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T02:40:12.130403476-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
